description: Comprehensive ticket system features for 3-party interaction between landlords, tenants, and caretakers

qualityStandards.description: All items must follow PropManager design best practices established in design-best-practices-prd.json
principles: Use FormRequest for validation, not inline $request->validate()
Use Policy for authorization, not manual checks
All new models must have Factories

feedbackLoops.description: Run ALL feedback loops before marking passes:true

commands.typecheck: npm run build -- --mode development 2>&1 | grep -i error

workflow.description: Each item should follow this workflow
steps: 1. Write failing test for acceptance criteria
2. Implement minimum code to pass
3. Refactor while keeping tests green
4. Run verification skill
5. Update passes:true only if all checks pass

user_stories.title: Real-time Ticket Created Notification
user_stories.description: When a tenant creates a new ticket, landlord and assigned caretaker (if auto-assigned) see it instantly on their dashboards.
steps: Create TicketCreated event implementing ShouldBroadcast
Dispatch from TicketController::store() after ticket creation
Broadcast to landlord.{landlordId} channel
Add Echo listener in landlord Dashboard.vue for new tickets
Prepend new ticket to recentTickets list
Increment open_tickets count in action items
Play notification sound or show toast
acceptance_criteria: Landlord sees new ticket appear in dashboard without refresh
New ticket appears at top of recentTickets list
Works for tickets created via web and API

user_stories.title: Real-time Ticket Assignment Notification
user_stories.description: When a landlord assigns a ticket to a caretaker, the caretaker sees it appear in their todaysTasks instantly.
steps: Create TicketAssigned event implementing ShouldBroadcast
Dispatch from TicketController::assign() after assignment
Broadcast to landlord.{landlordId} channel (caretakers subscribe here)
Include old_assignee_id and new_assignee_id in payload
Add Echo listener in Caretaker/Dashboard.vue for assignments
New assignee: prepend ticket to todaysTasks
Old assignee (if any): remove ticket from todaysTasks
Update ticket stats for both caretakers
acceptance_criteria: New assignee sees ticket appear without refresh
Old assignee sees ticket removed without refresh
Stats update correctly for both parties

user_stories.title: Real-time Ticket Comment Notification
user_stories.description: When a comment is added to a ticket, all parties see a comment indicator update in real-time.
steps: Create TicketCommented event implementing ShouldBroadcast
Dispatch from TicketController::addComment()
Broadcast to landlord and tenant channels
Include is_internal flag (internal comments not sent to tenant channel)
Add comment_count to ticket in dashboard lists
Show visual indicator for new comments on ticket cards
acceptance_criteria: Reporter sees new comment indicator on their ticket
Caretaker sees comment on assigned tickets
Internal comments not visible to tenant

user_stories.title: Real-time Ticket List Page Updates
user_stories.description: Extend real-time updates to Tickets/Index.vue pages for all roles, not just dashboards.
steps: Add Echo listeners to Tickets/Index.vue
Handle TicketCreated, TicketStatusChanged, TicketAssigned events
Filter updates based on current page filters
Update pagination counts if needed
Handle ticket removal from list when status changes

user_stories.title: Landlord Ticket Summary Widget
user_stories.description: Add a comprehensive ticket summary widget to landlord dashboard showing ticket distribution by status, priority, and building.
steps: Create ticket summary component with charts/stats
Show breakdown by status (open, in_progress, resolved, closed)
Show breakdown by priority (urgent, high, medium, low)
Show breakdown by building (if multiple buildings)
Add quick filters to jump to filtered ticket list
Real-time update counts when tickets change
acceptance_criteria: Widget shows accurate ticket counts by category
Clicking a category navigates to filtered list
Counts update in real-time with WebSocket events

user_stories.title: Caretaker Workload Dashboard
user_stories.description: Enhanced caretaker dashboard showing workload metrics, completion rate, and average resolution time.
steps: Calculate tickets resolved this week/month
Calculate average resolution time
Show completion rate percentage
Add performance trend chart (optional)
Show upcoming ticket deadlines/SLAs if any
acceptance_criteria: Metrics update when tickets are resolved

user_stories.title: Tenant Ticket History Widget
user_stories.description: Add a ticket history section to tenant dashboard showing resolved tickets with feedback status.
steps: Add 'Recent Resolved' section below 'My Tickets'
Show tickets closed in last 30 days
Indicate which have feedback submitted
Allow quick feedback submission from dashboard
Link to full ticket history page
acceptance_criteria: Can submit feedback directly from widget

user_stories.title: Ticket SLA Breach Alerts
user_stories.description: Alert landlord and caretaker when a ticket is approaching or has breached its SLA based on priority.
steps: Define SLA thresholds per priority (urgent: 4h, high: 24h, etc.)
Create scheduled job to check ticket ages
Send notification when approaching SLA (75% of time)
Send urgent notification when SLA breached
Show SLA status indicator on ticket cards
Add SLA breach count to action items
acceptance_criteria: Tickets approaching SLA show warning indicator
Action items show SLA breach count

user_stories.title: Ticket Escalation Workflow
user_stories.description: Auto-escalate tickets to landlord if caretaker doesn't respond within threshold.
steps: Add escalated_at and escalation_level fields to tickets
Create scheduled job to check unacknowledged tickets
Escalate if no response within threshold (e.g., 2 hours for urgent)
Notify landlord of escalation
Show escalation status on ticket
Allow manual escalation by tenant
acceptance_criteria: Unacknowledged urgent tickets auto-escalate after 2 hours

user_stories.title: Ticket Templates for Common Issues
user_stories.description: Allow landlords to create ticket templates for common issues to speed up ticket creation.
steps: Create TicketTemplate model with title, description, category, subcategory, priority
Add CRUD for templates (landlord only)
Show template selector when creating ticket
Auto-fill form fields from template
Track template usage for analytics
acceptance_criteria: Tenants see template selector when creating ticket

user_stories.title: Ticket Auto-Assignment Rules
user_stories.description: Allow landlords to set rules for auto-assigning tickets to caretakers based on category, building, or round-robin.
steps: Create TicketAssignmentRule model
Support rules: by category, by building, by load balancing
Apply rules in TicketObserver::created
Show assigned caretaker immediately after ticket creation
Allow override of auto-assignment

user_stories.title: Ticket Analytics and Reporting
user_stories.description: Provide analytics dashboard for landlords showing ticket trends, resolution times, and caretaker performance.
steps: Create TicketAnalyticsService for aggregations
Build analytics dashboard page
Show: tickets by period, avg resolution time, by category, by building
Show caretaker leaderboard (optional)
Export to PDF/Excel
Add date range filters
